=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

  (no quick fixes)

[D2] (5:10-5:28) TS377090: This `typeof ... .Type` query can be replaced with `UserId`. effect(unnecessaryTypeofType)
  Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryTypeofType for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryTypeofType for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Replace with 'UserId'"

[D3] (6:7-6:8) TS6133: 'b' is declared but its value is never read.
  (no quick fixes)

  Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryTypeofType for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryTypeofType for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Replace with 'UsersRepo.User'"

[D5] (7:7-7:29) TS6133: 'namespaceImportTrigger' is declared but its value is never read.
  (no quick fixes)

[D6] (7:31-7:65) TS377090: This `typeof ... .Type` query can be replaced with `Schemas.UsersRepo.User`. effect(unnecessaryTypeofType)
  Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryTypeofType for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryTypeofType for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Replace with 'Schemas.UsersRepo.User'"

  (no quick fixes)

  (no quick fixes)

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D2] Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryTypeofType for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryTypeofType for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 2: "Replace with 'UserId'" ===

--- file:///.src/test.ts ---
// @effect-diagnostics unnecessaryTypeofType:warning
import { OrdersRepo, SessionId, UserId, UsersRepo } from "./schemas"
import * as Schemas from "./schemas"

const a: UserId = {}
const b: typeof UsersRepo.User.Type = { id: 1 }
const namespaceImportTrigger: typeof Schemas.UsersRepo.User.Type = { id: 1 }
const shouldNotTriggerMissingType: typeof SessionId.Type = {}
const shouldNotTriggerMismatchedType: typeof OrdersRepo.Order.Type = { id: 1 }

const c: UserId = {}
const d: UsersRepo.User = { id: 1 }


=== [D4] Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryTypeofType for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D4] Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryTypeofType for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D4] Fix 2: "Replace with 'UsersRepo.User'" ===

--- file:///.src/test.ts ---
// @effect-diagnostics unnecessaryTypeofType:warning
import { OrdersRepo, SessionId, UserId, UsersRepo } from "./schemas"
import * as Schemas from "./schemas"

const a: typeof UserId.Type = {}
const b: UsersRepo.User = { id: 1 }
const namespaceImportTrigger: typeof Schemas.UsersRepo.User.Type = { id: 1 }
const shouldNotTriggerMissingType: typeof SessionId.Type = {}
const shouldNotTriggerMismatchedType: typeof OrdersRepo.Order.Type = { id: 1 }

const c: UserId = {}
const d: UsersRepo.User = { id: 1 }


=== [D6] Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryTypeofType for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D6] Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryTypeofType for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D6] Fix 2: "Replace with 'Schemas.UsersRepo.User'" ===

--- file:///.src/test.ts ---
// @effect-diagnostics unnecessaryTypeofType:warning
import { OrdersRepo, SessionId, UserId, UsersRepo } from "./schemas"
import * as Schemas from "./schemas"

const a: typeof UserId.Type = {}
const b: typeof UsersRepo.User.Type = { id: 1 }
const namespaceImportTrigger: Schemas.UsersRepo.User = { id: 1 }
const shouldNotTriggerMissingType: typeof SessionId.Type = {}
const shouldNotTriggerMismatchedType: typeof OrdersRepo.Order.Type = { id: 1 }

const c: UserId = {}
const d: UsersRepo.User = { id: 1 }
